instruction: Change "a low wooden table" to "a copper table".
source_caption_short: a low wooden table with a carved design and a vase filled with flowers which includes what appears to be red geraniums white daisies and others
source_caption_long: a low wooden table with a carved design and a vase filled with flowers which includes what appears to be red geraniums white daisies and others
target_caption_long: a copper table with a carved design and a vase filled with flowers which includes what appears to be red geraniums white daisies and others
